member.name: T:Microsoft.Maui.Controls.Hosting.AppHostBuilderExtensions
member.summary: This class contains the Map's extensions.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Controls.Hosting.AppHostBuilderExtensions.UseMauiMaps(Microsoft.Maui.Hosting.MauiAppBuilder)
member.summary: Configures to add support for the control.
member.param: The to configure.
member.exception: Thrown on Windows because the maps control currently is not implemented for Windows.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Controls.Hosting.AppHostBuilderExtensions.AddMauiMaps(Microsoft.Maui.Hosting.IMauiHandlersCollection)
member.summary: Registers the .NET MAUI Maps handlers that are needed to render the map control.
member.param: An instance of on which to register the map handlers.
member.returns: The provided object with the registered map handlers for subsequent registration calls.
member.exception: Thrown on Windows because the maps control currently is not implemented for Windows.

member.summary: Gets or sets the center location. This is a bindable property.

member.summary: Gets or sets the radius. This is a bindable property.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Maui.Controls.Maps.Circle.FillColor
member.summary: Gets or sets the fill color. This is a bindable property.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Maui.Controls.Maps.Map
member.summary: The Map control is a cross-platform view for displaying and annotating maps.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Controls.Maps.Map.OnHandlerChanged
member.summary: Raised when the handler for this map control changed.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Maui.Controls.Maps.Map.MapTypeProperty
member.summary: Bindable property for .

member.summary: Bindable property for .

member.summary: Bindable property for .

member.summary: Bindable property for .

member.summary: Bindable property for .

member.summary: Bindable property for .

member.summary: Bindable property for .

member.summary: Bindable property for .

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Controls.Maps.Map.#ctor(Microsoft.Maui.Maps.MapSpan)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with a region.
member.param: The region that should be initially shown by the map.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Controls.Maps.Map.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with a region.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Maui.Controls.Maps.Map.IsScrollEnabled
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that indicates if scrolling by user input is enabled. Default value is . This is a bindable property.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Maui.Controls.Maps.Map.IsZoomEnabled
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that indicates if zooming by user input is enabled. Default value is . This is a bindable property.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Maui.Controls.Maps.Map.IsShowingUser
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that indicates if the map shows an indicator of the current position of this device. Default value is This is a bindable property.
member.remarks: Depending on the platform it is likely that runtime permission(s) need to be requested to determine the current location of the device.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Maui.Controls.Maps.Map.IsTrafficEnabled
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that indicates if the map shows current traffic information. Default value is . This is a bindable property.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Maui.Controls.Maps.Map.MapType
member.summary: Gets or sets the style of the map. Default value is . This is a bindable property.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Maui.Controls.Maps.Map.Pins
member.summary: Gets the pins currently added to this map.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Maui.Controls.Maps.Map.ItemsSource
member.summary: Gets or sets the object that represents the collection of pins that should be shown on the map. This is a bindable property.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Maui.Controls.Maps.Map.ItemTemplate
member.summary: Gets or sets the template that is to be applied to each object in . This is a bindable property.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Maui.Controls.Maps.Map.ItemTemplateSelector
member.summary: Gets or sets the object that selects the template that is to be applied to each object in . This is a bindable property.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Maui.Controls.Maps.Map.MapElements
member.summary: Gets the elements (pins, polygons, polylines, etc.) currently added to this map.

member.name: E:Microsoft.Maui.Controls.Maps.Map.MapClicked
member.summary: Occurs when the user clicks/taps on the map control.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Maui.Controls.Maps.Map.VisibleRegion
member.summary: Gets the currently visible region of the map.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Controls.Maps.Map.GetEnumerator
member.summary: Returns an enumarator of all the pins that are currently added to the map.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Controls.Maps.Map.MoveToRegion(Microsoft.Maui.Maps.MapSpan)
member.summary: Adjusts the viewport of the map control to view the specified region.
member.param: A object containing details on what region should be shown.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Maui.Controls.Maps.MapElement
member.summary: Represents an element which is visually drawn on the control.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Maui.Controls.Maps.MapElement.StrokeColorProperty
member.summary: Bindable property for .

member.name: F:Microsoft.Maui.Controls.Maps.MapElement.StrokeWidthProperty
member.summary: Bindable property for .

member.name: P:Microsoft.Maui.Controls.Maps.MapElement.StrokeColor
member.summary: Gets or sets the stroke color. This is a bindable property.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Maui.Controls.Maps.MapElement.StrokeWidth
member.summary: Gets or sets the stroke width. The default value is 5f. This is a bindable property.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Maui.Controls.Maps.MapElement.MapElementId
member.summary: Gets or sets the platform counterpart of this map element.
member.remarks: This should typically not be set by the developer. Doing so might result in unpredictable behavior.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Maui.Controls.Maps.Pin
member.summary: Represents a pin on the control.

member.summary: Bindable property for .

member.summary: Bindable property for .

member.summary: Bindable property for .

member.name: F:Microsoft.Maui.Controls.Maps.Pin.LabelProperty
member.summary: Bindable property for .

member.name: P:Microsoft.Maui.Controls.Maps.Pin.Type
member.summary: Gets or sets the kind of pin. The default value is . This is a bindable property.
member.remarks: Depending on the platform, and versions of the platform, this might change the visual representation. This varies between the different platforms.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Maui.Controls.Maps.Pin.MarkerId
member.summary: Gets or sets the platform counterpart of this pin element.
member.remarks: This should typically not be set by the developer. Doing so might result in unpredictable behavior.

member.name: E:Microsoft.Maui.Controls.Maps.Pin.MarkerClicked
member.summary: Raised when this marker is clicked.

member.name: E:Microsoft.Maui.Controls.Maps.Pin.InfoWindowClicked
member.summary: Raised when the info window for this marker is clicked.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Controls.Maps.Pin.op_Equality(Microsoft.Maui.Controls.Maps.Pin,Microsoft.Maui.Controls.Maps.Pin)
member.summary: Equality operator for equals.
member.param: Left to compare.
Right to compare.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Controls.Maps.Pin.op_Inequality(Microsoft.Maui.Controls.Maps.Pin,Microsoft.Maui.Controls.Maps.Pin)
member.summary: Inequality operator.
member.param: Left to compare.
Right to compare.
member.returns: if objects are not equal, otherwise .

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Controls.Maps.Pin.SendMarkerClick
member.summary: Triggers the click/tap event for a pin.
member.returns: if the info window associated to this pin will hide after this event has occurred, otherwise
member.remarks: For internal use only. This API can be changed or removed without notice at any time.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Controls.Maps.Pin.SendInfoWindowClick
member.summary: Triggers the click/tap event for a info window of a pin.
member.returns: if the info window associated to this pin will hide after this event has occurred, otherwise
member.remarks: For internal use only. This API can be changed or removed without notice at any time.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Maui.Controls.Maps.Polygon
member.summary: Represents a polygon drawn on the map control.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Maui.Controls.Maps.Polygon.Item(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets or sets the location object at the specified index.
member.param: The index of the location object to return or set.
member.returns: The location object at the specified index.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Maui.Controls.Maps.Polygon.Count
member.summary: Gets the location object count in this polygon.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Maui.Controls.Maps.Polygon.IsReadOnly
member.summary: Gets whether this polygon is read-only.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Controls.Maps.Polygon.Add(Microsoft.Maui.Devices.Sensors.Location)
member.summary: Adds a location to this polygon.
member.param: The location to add.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Controls.Maps.Polygon.Clear
member.summary: Clears all locations that make up this polygon.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Controls.Maps.Polygon.Contains(Microsoft.Maui.Devices.Sensors.Location)
member.summary: Returns whether the specified location is contained in this polygon.
member.param: The location object of which to determine if it is contained in the location collection of this polygon.
member.returns: if is contained in the location collection of this polygon, otherwise .

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Controls.Maps.Polygon.CopyTo(Microsoft.Maui.Devices.Sensors.Location[],System.Int32)
member.summary: Copies the child locations to the specified array.
member.param: The target array to copy the child views to.
The index at which the copying needs to start.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Controls.Maps.Polygon.GetEnumerator
member.summary: Returns an enumerator that lists all of the location object in this polygon.
member.returns: A of type with all the locations in this polygon.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Controls.Maps.Polygon.IndexOf(Microsoft.Maui.Devices.Sensors.Location)
member.summary: Gets the index of a specified location object.
member.param: The location object of which to determine the index.
member.returns: The index of the specified location, if the location was not found this will return -1.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Controls.Maps.Polygon.Insert(System.Int32,Microsoft.Maui.Devices.Sensors.Location)
member.summary: Inserts a location object at the specified index.
member.param: The index at which to specify the location object.
The location object to insert.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Controls.Maps.Polygon.Remove(Microsoft.Maui.Devices.Sensors.Location)
member.summary: Removes a location object from this polygon.
member.param: The location object to remove.
member.returns: if the location was removed successfully, otherwise .

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Controls.Maps.Polygon.RemoveAt(System.Int32)
member.summary: Removes a location object at the specified index.
member.param: The index at which to remove the location.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Maui.Controls.Maps.Polygon.FillColorProperty
member.summary: Bindable property for .

member.name: P:Microsoft.Maui.Controls.Maps.Polygon.FillColor
member.summary: Gets or sets the fill color. This is a bindable property.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Maui.Controls.Maps.Polygon.Geopath
member.summary: Gets a list of locations on the map which forms the outline of this polygon on the map.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Controls.Maps.Polygon.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.summary: Represents a polyline drawn on the map control.

member.summary: Gets or sets the location object at the specified index.

member.returns: The location object at the specified index.

member.summary: Gets the location object count in this polyline.

member.summary: Gets whether this polyline is read-only.

member.summary: Adds a location to this polyline.

member.summary: Clears all locations that make up this polyline.

member.summary: Returns whether the specified location is contained in this polyline.
member.param: The location object of which to determine if it is contained in the location collection of this polyline.
member.returns: if is contained in the location collection of this polyline, otherwise .

member.summary: Copies the child locations to the specified array.
member.param: The target array to copy the child views to.
The index at which the copying needs to start.

member.summary: Returns an enumerator that lists all of the location object in this polyline.
member.returns: A of type with all the locations in this polyline.

member.summary: Gets the index of a specified location object.
member.param: The location object of which to determine the index.
member.returns: The index of the specified location, if the location was not found this will return -1.

member.summary: Inserts a location object at the specified index.
member.param: The index at which to specify the location object.
The location object to insert.

member.summary: Removes a location object from this polyline.
member.param: The location object to remove.
member.returns: if the location was removed successfully, otherwise .

member.summary: Removes a location object at the specified index.
member.param: The index at which to remove the location.

member.summary: Gets a list of locations on the map which forms the polyline on the map.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.summary: Event arguments that are associated with a click/tap event that occurs on the map control.

member.summary: Gets the location of the click/tap.

member.param: The location data associated with this event.

member.summary: Gets or sets whether the info window should be hidden after the event occurred.
